name: All-Purpose Ground Meat Mix
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds ground beef, or turkey or chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, brown the ground meat, stirring to break up any large pieces.
2. Drain off excess grease.
3. Stir in salt, celery, onion, and bell pepper.
4. Cover; simmer until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat; set aside to cool.
6. Ladle the meat mixture into six 2-cup freezer containers with tight-fitting lids. Leave 1/2 inch of space at the top of each container.
7. Draw a knife several times through the mixture in each container to prevent air pockets.
8. Secure lids on the containers; label with date and contents.
9. Store in the freezer. Use within 3 months.
Makes 6 packages, or about 12 cups, of All-Purpose Ground Meat Mix.
